description: Goal: finish the staging cleanup by deleting eager function-expansion leftovers and making the new layering explicit in docs and telemetry. Signal: docs say source publication decides what exists while function demand decides body-local meaning; telemetry exposes no ScopeCode waits on body-local macro readiness; eager function expansion helpers are gone from source_publish; the false-start local refactor has been deliberately discarded rather than carried forward. Strategy: remove dead helpers and tests, update agent-facing docs and pipeline docs, and add narrow regressions that lock in the new boundary.
title: Compiler2 function staging closeout: delete eager leftovers and restate the layer split
